item.title: About
item.description: My name is Glenn Lewis I’m a DevOps Engineer. I currently live in Austin, TX with my wife and dog. I am going to sue this site to track my 100 days of code and as a technical blog.
item.content:
My name is Glenn Lewis

I’m a DevOps Engineer.

I currently live in Austin, TX with my wife and dog.

I am going to sue this site to track my 100 days of code and as a technical blog.

item.title: Day0
item.description: 100 Days Of Code - Log Day 0: March 2,2024 Today’s Progress: Created base site framework. Thoughts: Going to work on editing the theme and removing unnecessary elements. Link(s) to work:
item.content:
100 Days Of Code - Log

Day 0: March 2,2024

Today’s Progress: Created base site framework.

Thoughts: Going to work on editing the theme and removing unnecessary elements.

Link(s) to work:

item.title: My First Post
item.description: It Begins This is my first post. I will edit this post
item.content:
It Begins

This is my first post. I will edit this post
